findings.note:
Tautological repetition: parenthetical re-states the term. JP pattern '機密性
(Confidentiality)' was copied into EN verbatim; EN does not need the parenthetical gloss.

observed.jp: 改ざんされていないデータ
observed.en: Data that has not been tampered with

expected_reference.jp: 情報が正確であり、改ざんや破壊が行われていないこと (p522)

findings.note: p523 definition of 完全性/Integrity omits two of three canonical dimensions (accuracy, destruction). ISO 27001 Integrity = accuracy + completeness + absence of unauthorized modification. The shortened definition may mislead exam takers who see questions about '破壊'.

findings.expected: 合理化 (preferred zh criminology/audit term for 'Rationalization')
findings.note: 「正当化」is a jp-kanji term preserved in zh. Standard zh audit/fraud-triangle literature uses「合理化」for the Rationalization vertex. Risk of confusion for zh learners.

findings.expected: Consistent: either both use western year or both keep JP era notation
findings.note: Inconsistent era notation: en converts '平成28年度' → 'FY2016' but zh preserves JP era name '平成28年度'. Should be harmonized across zh/en.

findings.observed: 在IT护照考试中不称为「解密化」，仅称为「解密」
findings.expected: Note is JP-exam specific; zh equivalent would be: 考试中直接称为「解密」
findings.note: 「解密化」is a JP-ized construction (復号化) that has no zh analogue. The note translated literally may confuse zh learners who never encountered 「解密化」. Low severity as the intent is clear, but the phrasing introduces a phantom non-term.

findings.observed: 対称密钥加密方式 (U+5BFE 対 = JP shinjitai)
findings.expected: 对称密钥加密方式 (U+5BF9 对 = simplified Chinese)
findings.note: JP kanji leak in zh surface: '対' (U+5BFE, Japanese shinjitai) used instead of '对' (U+5BF9, simplified Chinese). Visually similar but technically wrong character set. Note: same term on p531 uses correct U+5BF9 对 — inconsistency between p530 and p531.

summary: Audited 10 pages (129 leaves) covering information security CIA triad, security management, exam Q&A (p524-527), and cryptographic technology fundamentals (p529-531). Found 6 issues: 2 MODERATE, 4 MINOR, 0 CRITICAL. No U+FFFD, no katakana-in-zh, no duplicate markers, all 13 answer_indexes confirmed correct. Key defects: (F2) p523 完全性/Integrity definition omits accuracy+destruction dimensions vs p522 canonical; (F6) p530 共通鍵暗号方式 surface.zh uses JP shinjitai '対' (U+5BFE) instead of simplified '对' (U+5BF9); (F3) Fraud Triangle zh uses jp-kanji '正当化' instead of standard zh '合理化'; (F1) EN table cell tautological 'Confidentiality (Confidentiality)'; (F4) inconsistent era notation zh/en; (F5) phantom '解密化' term introduced in zh.
